title: Personalised 1st Christmas Sack Large Baby First Gift Santa Stockings Childrens Xmas Post Mail Bags NS018 (Large)
features: Add Childs Name to the front of the sack. Celebrate Babies First Christmas with this perfect Keepsake Gift
Large Xmas Sacks - 50cm x 70cm - Looks Great under the Tree full of Presents & Gifts
Small Bag - 30cm 40cm - Perfect to use as a Childs stocking, Great Little Xmas Eve Bags
Made from Strong Canvas with Red drawstring Ties. Machine Washable - Will look great Year after Year.
Must have for this Christma!! Made here in the UK. Exclusive to KRAFTYGIFTS
description: Product Description Personalised Santa Sacks Our Super Festive Personalised Christmas Sacks are perfect for the festive season! Whether it's your Child's first Xmas or you want something to pop Grandad's gifts in, we've got a sack for you! Personalised For You Add a personal touch this festive season with personalisation! You can add a name to the front of the sack for an extra special gift! The design is printed using professional-standard sublimation inks, resulting in vibrant colours and an image that won't fade, meaning your sack will last and look great year after year. Festive Drawstrings Featuring traditional festive red drawstrings ties for a sturdy fastening, keeping presents secure! Strong Material Our Christmas sacks are made from super soft natural linen. They can be hand washed at 30 degrees for easy cleaning. KraftyGifts Manufactured exclusively by KraftyGifts, a British company, our sacks are finished with a festive red KraftyGifts label. Each sack is hand-made to order and personalised with care.
